name: Power (パワー)
description:
Really just the definitive Power!

I was surprised to that there weren't that many Powers on here, so I took it upon myself to make the best one I could possible.

Yes, she is as thicc as the image suggests, and she's fully aware of it too cause this Power ain't flat chested, I tweaked her appearance to make her as voluptuous as her profile picture as possible. She's thicc and she knows it guys, so dw! Her sample dialogue, which there is PLENTY of, is written practically word for word from her dialogue in the manga. Her personality is also as accurate as possible, thanks to several wikis, you'll just have to trust me and see for yourself. Oh and she's also aware of all the lore and characters and shit, at least all the ones Power should know.

I have more definitive bots, but can't share because they'd definitely be taken down.

Artist for the image is ignantastro. This bot is partially based off of @pablo™️ 's Power bot btw, so go show them love.
creator: Ayomini
